titleStmt.title: SII 37.50: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 50. (A.R. No. B 388 of 1938-39.) Kopparti, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in the compound of Chinna Ellayya's house.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi Āshādha śu. 15, Lunar eclipse corresponding to 1544 A.D., July 4, Friday.

It states that Peda-Mallamarāju, son of Aṁdugala Parvatarāju on the orders of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Naṁdēla Nāreparāju, son of Timmayadēvamahārāju exempted the village Koppōlu and Tippalūru from paying the taxes viz. grāma-kaṭnam, sunka-sthavarālu and aḍukkoḷḷu as these two villages were exempted from paying these taxes earlier by Kṛishṇadēvarāya by issuing a copper-plate charter. It is stated that subsequent to the reigns of Kṛishnadēvarāya the taxes (maḷḷu i.e., māḍala) on these two villages were collected by the government as they were not aware of the privileges granted to these villages. This grant is made to the vidvanmahājanas of the village Kōppōlu agrahāra alias Kṛishṇarāyapura on the occasion of the lunar eclipse.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 165.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunēṭi krōdhi saṁvva
tsara Āṣāḍha śu 15 lu śrīmadrājādhirājarā
japaramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāśivadēva
mahārāyalū vijayanagaramaṁdu ratna siṁhā
sanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivirājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁgā
śrīmadyajanābhiṣaṭka¨rma niratulaina kṛṣṇarāya
pura pratināmaka koppōli Agrahārasthitāśēṣavidva
nmahājanālakunnu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdēla ti
mmayadēva mahārājulu nāreparājuluṁgāri Āna
tini kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyā
yulaina Aṁdugala pa¨rvvatarāyu putruṁḍu peda
mallamarājuṁgāru dhāravōśi yiccina suṁkadha
¨rmma śāsanakramameṭlannanu kritaṁ kriṣṇadēvamahā
rāyalu mī koppōlu tippalūri grāmāla
ku grāmakaṭnaṁ guraka sthāvarālu sahasa¨rva
mānyaṁ Agrahārālugānu tāmraśāsana
pū¨rvvakaṁgānu dhāravōśi Iccina taravā
tanu yī saṁdhini nagari yerukaleka suṁka
ṁvāru Addukkōlucēśi māḷlukōnaṁgānu śrī
sadāśivadēva mahārāyalu naṁdela tiṁmmarā
ju nāraparājuṁgāriki nāyaṁkarānaku gaṁḍi
kōṭadu¨rgaṁpāliṁstēnu Ātiṁmmarāju nārapa
rājuṁgāru pū¨rvamaryādanu koppōlu tippa
lūru grāma suṁka sthāvarālu Aḍukkōlu
damaku puṇyaṁgā
nu mānitimani mudala yistēnu yī tathātithini sōma
grahaṇapuṇyakālamaṁdu kōpapōli tippalūrulaku grā
ma kaṭnaṁ suṁkasthāvarālu Aḍukkōlu sahā sa¨rvamā
nyaṁgā māni timani dhāravōsi Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ
yī dha¨rmaśāsanānaku yivvaru tappinānu
tamatallitaṁḍḍila vāraṇāsilō caṁpina pā
pāna bōvuvāru gaṁgakaratana gōbrāhmaṇula ca
ṁpina pāpānapōvuvāru Iṭani Icina śāsa
namu . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt
Digital edition of SII 37.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
